title: Complete the orphan pages: heart + umbrella
oneline: Both orphan pages completed end-to-end, all gates green, in 12 Gemini calls
summary: Verified the real gaps are heart-wide and umbrella-tall (IDEAS.md had them backwards). Authored both missing pens by conditioning Gemini on the sibling orientation with an explicit imageConfig aspectRatio, then ran the full standard suite (thumb, chalk, light, night, punch) — every stock gate passed, mostly first-attempt. Wired both pages into books.ts; check:assets (496 assets), svelte-check, and 353 unit tests all green. Zero API calls remain to ship; docs/PROMPTS.md lacks the promised pen prompt, so the sibling-conditioned recipe should be documented.
tried: Inventory of both pages' assets on disk vs the books.ts catalog
Sibling-conditioned pen authoring via gemini-2.5-flash-image + imageConfig.aspectRatio
Full standard suite on both new pens with stock gates (chalk, light fill, night fill, punch)
worked: Sibling conditioning kept the category style perfectly; both pens scored 0 solid px
Chalks and night fills passed all gates in 1 attempt each; heart light fill in 1, umbrella light in 4
Eyeless --notes preempted the documented house-wide refusal failure
Full validation green with both pages cataloged (496 assets, 353 tests)
failed: First heart-wide pen kept a portrait composition on the wide canvas (fixed with a fill-the-axis note)
docs/PROMPTS.md does not actually contain a pen-outline prompt (the idea text pointed there)
limitations: Human contact-sheet review (the pipeline's final gate) not performed
umbrella-tall light fill leaves raindrops a near-white tint; passes the white gate but may want a reviewer retint
umbrella-tall has slightly larger top/bottom margins than its sibling
